data.name: Subtitle
data.value: Start and run analysis events for your courses.

data.name: DriveCredentialsMissing
data.value: Google Drive credentials are not configured. Add them through user-secrets, environment variables, or the ignored appsettings.Local.json before participants register or recordings are uploaded.

data.name: DriveRootFolderMissing
data.value: No central Google Drive folder id is configured. The adapter will use the configured root folder name instead.

data.name: EmptyText
data.value: Create an event with the running analysis type in course management.

data.name: TrainerNotResolved
data.value: The coach could not be resolved.
